title: Silver's Mace Indicator
description: Another way to differentiate density and breach maces!
body:
# Description
This pack offers players a way to differentiate a mace enchanted with breach and density.


# General Information
![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ab26941dfc49bccea444c805aedbebf0a97579.png)

Mace Color and there Enchantment/Context:
- Red = Breach
- Light Blue = Density
- Yellow = Breach and Density
